utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Now check if each one is fully specified: (1) property — includes detailed addresses, property types, bedrooms, bathrooms, area, price, and features for three properties. Fully specified. (2) financing — includes lender, mortgage type, preapproval amount, down payment, interest rate, amortization period, and monthly payment estimate. Fully specified. (3) legal_services — includes provider, list of services, and estimated cost. Fully specified. (4) moving_services — includes provider, services, and estimated cost. Fully specified. (5) setup_services — includes list of utility services with costs and installation total. Fully specified. (6) total_budget — includes property price, legal fees, moving cost, setup cost, and total estimated cost. Fully specified. Thus, all six items are covered completely.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected three purchase properties and several service providers. To map them, I looked for the closest equivalents in the ground-truth ratings. The assistant’s properties (45 Heward Ave, 120 Sudbury St #206, 19 Perth Ave) are all purchase-type properties. In the ground-truth set, the purchase properties include Modern Apartment, Family House, Move-in Ready, New Build, Commercial Conversion, Historic Townhouse, Starter Flat, Investment Property, Luxury Villa, and Waterfront Property. The assistant’s first property (45 Heward Avenue, Leslieville) is a semi-detached house with 3 bedrooms, 2 baths, and a backyard, priced at CAD $825K, which is most comparable to the 'Historic Townhouse'—similar budget bracket and type—rated 6. The second property (120 Sudbury Street #206, Liberty Village condo loft) aligns with 'Modern Apartment'—urban, modern, tech-oriented—rated 9. The third property (19 Perth Avenue, Junction Triangle townhouse) fits closest to 'Family House'—3 bedrooms, family-focused, near transit—rated 10. For financing, the assistant used a traditional 5-year fixed-rate mortgage from TD, which maps to 'Traditional Mortgage'—rated 9. Legal services correspond to the 'Premium Legal Package'—rated 9. Moving services match 'Premium Moving'—rated 9. The setup utilities cost CAD $290, consistent with 'Premium Utilities'—rated 9.
